directives.rule: For an ESTABLISHED brand, the system does NOT ask the client the passport questions — it sends a RESEARCH AGENT to search the client across ALL platforms + Google (identity, products, red-lines, goals, channels, competitors) and fills the organs from that. The passport questions are for NEW brands only.
directives.his_words: El baik is a very established brand — when we extract we must send an agent to search for the client in all aspects from all the platforms and Google. go search; this question could be for a new brand

directives.rule: When a brand gives NO client answers, the system must FIGURE IT OUT from extraction + decide the sensible DEFAULT/role for that brand-type (don't block). alnasser is the test case for 'no answer'.
directives.his_words: Extract everything and consider no answer for this brand — what do you do then? Let the system figure out. Search; no answer for this brand; consider what is the role for this brand.

directives.rule: jurisha relates to ALL calendar occasions (father's day, mother's day, worker's day, all the days) — not just Islamic/Saudi.
directives.his_words: we need to relate with all the calendars: father day, mother day, worker day, all the days

status: NEW creation-system requirements — to build; the established-vs-new-vs-no-answer extraction policy is core to THE TOP (creation system).
